rows: Avalon Hotel and Bungalows Palm Springs
These guys will charge you $100 on top of what you already paid for "access to all of our amenities, fitness center, pools, shore cruises ect"

Room was clean but worn, location and ambience is good, service lackluster and slow. Employees seemed untrained and were untimely in all requests. It took 45 minutes to get breakfast order taken and had to go to the front desk and ask a manager to finally get a server. Concierge was late to their shift by 20 minutes delaying all guests that were waiting.

Dear Savina, Thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re glad to hear you enjoyed the room’s cleanliness, location, and ambience. We’ve noted your comments regarding service delays and staff responsiveness and will review them with our team to improve efficiency and consistency. Hope to welcome you back for an even smoother stay!

Die Zimmer sind schon alt und heruntergekommen, der Service ist für so ein Hotel nicht gut (mussten im Restaurant selbst die Getränke und das Essen holen da keiner zu uns auf die Terrasse kam, auch am Pool davor nicht), versteckte Kosten (zusätzliche Gebühren für Freizeitangebote obwohl wir nichts davon genutzt haben), würd ich nicht weiterempfehlen!

Good: Room was a good size, well equipped and clean.    Bad: A dozen or so marketing and irrelevant emails before we arrived including a satisfaction of stay survey. No advice that the restaurant only served pizza and the season was closing. Unresponsive to requests to refund incidentals charge on card.

Dear John,    Our apologies that your stay was not as you expected it to be. We always try to provide great experiences for your guests, and we missed the mark here. Please reach out to us directly so we could discuss your stay further.

AVOID at all costs.   Staff not interested at all  Had dinner at 8pm and the burgers came out without the bottom of the buns and no fries. By the time the fries eventually came after asking for them twice the burgers were cold. Then presented with our tab for dinner despite not having asked for the tab or having finished our meal or being asked if we wanted a dessert or coffees. Seriously poor.    The bar was also closed after dinner at 8:45pm!!    To cap it all went down for breakfast today to be told they aren’t doing breakfasts on Mondays despite us booking for 9am.     Multiple other guests very unhappy too about lack of breakfast. Basically told to get lost and go into town for it.     This is a seriously expensive hotel and the service is appalling. Sadly paid for tonight already or I would be checking out.

Dear Gary,    Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. I’m truly sorry to hear about your recent experience and the service issues you encountered during your stay. This is certainly not the level of hospitality we strive to provide, and I sincerely apologize for the disappointment you experienced at both dinner and breakfast.    Your comments have been shared with our management and food & beverage teams so we can review what went wrong and ensure this does not happen again. We greatly value your input and appreciate you bringing these matters to our attention.    Warm regards,  Ciaran
Good: Lovely views and aesthetic.    Bad: Service slow and no attention to detail. Had to ask about rollaway bed being removed but this never happened.
Dear Lauren,    Thank you for your review. Our sincere apologies that some elements fell short during your stay with us. We hope to make up for it again in the future.

THIEVES HERE!  Paid for 3 nights in FULL, then when you show up they added $800.00 at the front desk. When we checked out they told us that we had a $525.00 credit coming back because we charged Nothing to the room. I was assured 3x by site Manager Eddie (Eduardo) and his supervisor but now almost 3 weeks later and after numerous times calling they say we sent the credit to my bank, but they LIE! Chase has not received any credit from them and they basically write you off if you call to complain. The place is rundown and for the price and the thievery you experience go ANY place else, save a small fortune and obtain a room that is actually worth their costs. Headed to Small Claims court, reporting them to BBB and leaving reviews they deserve on any site that takes one! FED UP!

Room was clean but worn, location and ambience is good, service lackluster and slow. Employees seemed untrained and were untimely in all requests. It took 45 minutes to get breakfast order taken and had to go to the front desk and ask a manager to finally get a server. Concierge was late to their shift by 20 minutes delaying all guests that were waiting.
Good: It is just stunning. Was October so pretty empty but wonderful views.    Bad: Restaurant & bar were not opened

Die Zimmer sind schon alt und heruntergekommen, der Service ist für so ein Hotel nicht gut (mussten im Restaurant selbst die Getränke und das Essen holen da keiner zu uns auf die Terrasse kam, auch am Pool davor nicht), versteckte Kosten (zusätzliche Gebühren für Freizeitangebote obwohl wir nichts davon genutzt haben), würd ich nicht weiterempfehlen!

Montauk during the off season is a fabulous time to visit. We stayed at Montauk Yacht Club for the weekend. We were greeted with a welcome beverage. Check in was seamless. We loved our room and view. The staff was attentive and accommodating. The fitness room was clean and quiet. Great space to work out. The restaurant was spacious and dinner was delicious. The market was closed while we were there, but we could get coffee and water at the hotel. We walked across the street to Star Island Yacht Club for lunch. It is a short drive to the town which is where we enjoyed shopping and eating. Blue Crush was a great spot for an acai bowl and healthy snacks. We stopped at Joni’s and Bird on a Roof for breakfast. Both great spots and close to the ocean. We walked to the beach with an iced coffee from the restaurant. So very relaxing. Our weekend adventure also included a horseback guided ride to the beach at Deep Hollow Ranch. Absolutely amazing weekend overall. Montauk is beautiful at any time and we will definitely be back to Montauk Yacht Club. Loved our stay there!

I’ve been coming to the club for 20 years & it keeps getting better & better. Terrific staff & service. The rooms are well appointed with nice extras like bathrobes, slippers and a well-stocked mini bar. My guest room was clean, bright  & well maintained. The food was great as well!  A wonderful experience. Highly recommended.

Good: Room was a good size, well equipped and clean.    Bad: A dozen or so marketing and irrelevant emails before we arrived including a satisfaction of stay survey. No advice that the restaurant only served pizza and the season was closing. Unresponsive to requests to refund incidentals charge on card.

We wanted to experience Montauk without the summer crowds, and we decided on booking a room at the Motauk Yacht Club in early October for our stay.    The hotel is absolutely beautiful, with fabulous attention to detail everywhere! The room was just perfect with a balcony overlooking Lake Montauk and all the stunning yachts in the marina. The staff was exceptionally warm, friendly and accommodating, and the food was so delicious! We'll definitely be back!

Wunderbares sehr zuvorkommendes Hotel. Grandiose Lage und sehr komfortabel. Wir waren leider ausserhalb der Saison da, daher relativ allein. Aber gerade da hat man sich sehr viel Mühe gemacht! Absolut empfehlenswert!

AVOID at all costs.   Staff not interested at all  Had dinner at 8pm and the burgers came out without the bottom of the buns and no fries. By the time the fries eventually came after asking for them twice the burgers were cold. Then presented with our tab for dinner despite not having asked for the tab or having finished our meal or being asked if we wanted a dessert or coffees. Seriously poor.    The bar was also closed after dinner at 8:45pm!!    To cap it all went down for breakfast today to be told they aren’t doing breakfasts on Mondays despite us booking for 9am.     Multiple other guests very unhappy too about lack of breakfast. Basically told to get lost and go into town for it.     This is a seriously expensive hotel and the service is appalling. Sadly paid for tonight already or I would be checking out.

Thank you to the MYC Team for a truly memorable 2025 Corporate Offsite Meeting! The group was thrilled with the MYC campus, meeting rooms, accommodations, staff, food & events. This is out 4th year holding this event and once again everything went perfectly and without a hitch. The planning & coordination was impeccable, completed in a timely manner, well in advance of the meeting - which is very much appreciated from a event planning perspective. I also wanted to especially thank the team for their flexibility and outside of the box thinking regarding the outdoor evening events and pivoting efficiently last minute due to inclement weather. Truly top-notch service and venue - Highly recommend for corporate events!
would have liked more breakfast options
Not a ton of options, seemed to be an abbreviated menu. Food was great thought!
The menu  was limited because they were closing the following week.
The Market was closed due to it being off season. The resort needs a hot tub or a steam room.

Circuit breaker went out from using hairdryer.  Had to have Maintenance come to get the outlet where it was plugged in to work again.  When they fixed it, they did not adjust the time on the alarm clock.  Heat/ac went on and off all night.  Weather stripping under door was missing so cold air, bugs, leaves etc. were blowing in the room.    Shower is great.  Beds are very comfortable.
Waiter forgot to enter my order. Had to reorder after waiting 30+ minutes.
bar was understaffed for the night we had our event. long lines
It was a set menu for our group but delicious
We were supposed to have a room facing the bay. They charged us about $50 less a night but we would have liked to face the bay.

very friendly staff. Food was simply prepared poorly. Salmon ordered medium rare came well done. Poached eggs were cooked to hard boiled status. Desert offered - chocolate chip cookie felt like we were in a motel. I heard the chef was excellent--the off season staff needs to step up.  It's a very small menu and very basic cooking skills needed. Also, website needs to be updated from summer.
Limited menu, breakfast wasn’t offered on a day we were there. Food very tasty.
We did not get the call about restaurant being closed for the majority of our stay.
Hostess was not initially aware of the happy hour menu.
We were not informed that breakfast was not served on our departure date, which affected the overall experience right at the end...    The team serving us at dinner was great, especially Leo.
